prompt: A dramatic UFC fight-poster style sports promotion for UFC 305, designed as a high-contrast vertical matchup graphic with two female MMA fighters facing inward in orthodox guard poses. The left fighter is a fit blonde woman with shoulder-length messy beach-wave hair, tan skin, a black sports bra, black UFC gloves, and black fight shorts, shown from upper thigh to head, turned slightly right. The right fighter is a fit dark-haired woman with long straight black hair, tan skin, a black sports bra, black UFC gloves, and black fight shorts, shown from upper thigh to head, turned slightly left, with a large detailed black-and-gray tattoo sleeve on her right arm and script tattoo text on the inner upper arm. Both fighters are sweaty, intensely lit, and centered close together with fists raised near chest height. Use a split background: fiery orange sparks and smoke on the left, icy blue-white sparks and haze on the right, with a dark black center seam. At the top center, place a black rectangular logo box with gold trim containing the gold text UFC 305. Beneath it, in stacked condensed white uppercase type, add the tagline: "TWO ICONS. ONE OCTAGON." Along the far left edge, place the surname "SWEENEY" vertically in large distressed gold letters; along the far right edge, place the surname "FOXX" vertically in large distressed silver-gray letters. In the center, overlay huge distressed white condensed sans-serif typography with the matchup names stacked exactly as SYDNEY SWEENEY above a small gold "VS" and MEGAN FOXX. Below that, add a small gold subtitle reading "BANTAMWEIGHT BOUT". At the bottom center, show a small realistic UFC octagon cage seen from a slightly elevated front angle, embedded into the poster. In front of the cage, place a black date card with gold trim containing stacked gold text: "JUNE 14", "SATURDAY", "10PM ET / 7PM PT". Below the card, add white text "LIVE ON" and the ESPN+ logo. Bottom left, add small gold and white ticket text reading "TICKETS ON SALE APRIL 25" with the Ticketmaster logo beneath. Bottom right, add the Rogers Arena logo and white text "ROGERS ARENA" with gold text "VANCOUVER, BC" below. Use a glossy premium combat-sports poster finish, cinematic rim lighting, gritty texture overlays, metallic typography, and intense face-off composition.
